changes.value:
src/search/content_fetcher.rs:256-462

Coverage: 0% for fetch pipeline methods

Uncovered lines: 256-312, 315-419, 436-462

```rust
pub async fn fetch_search_results(&self, results: Vec<SearchResult>) -> (...)
async fn fetch_single_result(&self, result: SearchResult) -> Result<...>
async fn wait_for_domain(&self, domain: &str) -> Result<...>
```

These are async methods requiring tokio and HTTP mocking:
1. fetch_search_results — concurrent orchestration with stats tracking
2. fetch_single_result — full pipeline: rate limit → fetch → quality check → process
3. wait_for_domain — rate limiting with max_domain_delay exceeded → RateLimited error

Note: Requires mockable HTTP client or integration test approach.
Add tests for ContentFetcher fetch pipeline and rate limiting
